name: Friskies Cat Turkey Gravy 85g
shortDescription: FRISKIES Turkey in Gravy 85g . Made with real turkey , this nutrient-rich wet food delivers 100% complete and balanced nutrition to support your cat’s overall health. Its tender pieces in flavorful gravy provide essential hydration and a taste cats can’t resist perfect for maintaining vitality and daily wellness.
description: Meat and animal derivatives (including 4% turkey), cereals, minerals, various sugars. Guaranteed Analysis Vitamin A: 541 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 83 IU/kg Iron (Fe): 19 mg/kg Iodine (I): 0.24 mg/kg Copper (Cu): 2.14 mg/kg Manganese (Mn): 3.7 mg/kg Zinc (Zn): 316 mg/kg Why You’ll Love It Quality Protein – Supports strong muscles and overall health. 100% Complete & Balanced – All the nutrients your cat needs daily. No Nasties – No colourants, no added artificial flavourings or preservatives. Suitable for Neutered Cats – Formulated to meet their specific needs. Trusted Purina Quality – Over 1,000 daily ingredient and production checks. Sustainability Commitment – 100% recyclable or reusable packaging by 2025
